description: The Random Point On Square node returns a random float2 value of a point on the edge of a unit square centered at ``[0; 0]``.

fields.* ([[Type:float2|float2]]): A random point on the edge of a unit square. This will be a float2 where one value is ``-0.5`` or ``0.5`` and the other value is between ``-0.5`` and ``0.5``.
